sglang.title: docs: fix module docstrings and copyright headers
sglang.author: XuehaiPan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

As per the title, fix module docstrings and copyright headers.
Modifications


Use multiline comments instead of triple quoted strings for copyright at the top of the file.

Before:
In [1]: import sglang.srt.layers.activation
 
In [2]: print(sglang.srt.layers.activation.__doc__)

Copyrig

Exposing max total num tokens, as requested in #1900.
Modifications

I'll add examples to Native APIs doc if this looks good.

sglang.title: Only stream output on tp rank 0
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Revert "Only stream output on tp rank 0"
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Reverts #2124 because it breaks dp attention

sglang.title: Add initial support for intel Gaudi accelerators
sglang.author: ankurneog
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Intel gaudi ( device name : hpu) has PyTorch support as an Out-of-tree device. In addition support for Triton is also available . With this initial PR we introduce intel gaudi ( device : hpu)  to SGLang
More details on Intel Gaudi SW installation can be found here :
https://docs.habana.ai

sglang.title: Add simple CPU offloading support.
sglang.author: janimo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Based on the vLLM implementation, applied to llama.py, gemma2.py and qwen2.py
Tested with unquantized Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 2 9B and Qwen 2.5 7B on a 6GB RTX 4060.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] support all attention backends
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
previously we register attention ops separately, e.g. flashinfer, flash attention.
this pr changes the registration to be the unified attention interface, so that we don't need to register these attention backends one by one.
how it works:

when we create an attention class, we register it in the pe

vllm.title: [v1] Refactor KVCacheManager for more hash input than token ids
vllm.author: rickyyx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the KVCacheManager such that:

It will be easier to pass in more metadata for hashing (e.g. lora id, mm_hash and etc)
Remove the needed of tracking token ids inside a block (which was used for hash calculation, but no longer needed since hash is assigned to a block).

Benchmarking

vllm.title: support bitsandbytes quantization with qwen model
vllm.author: zixuanzhang226

vllm.title: [Core] remove temporary local variables in LLMEngine.__init__
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These local variables were no longer necessary. They just helped
reduce the size of a previous change. Drop them and replace usage with
the equivalent instance variables.
This also removed some unnecessary duplicate assignments that were
doing B = A after assigning A = B just above it prior to a big

vllm.title: [V1] EngineCore supports profiling
vllm.author: Abatom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
EngineCore supports profiling, inspired by V0.
The idle time of the GPU has significantly decreased.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Update Llama Chat Templates to also support Non-Tool use
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For our use-case, we want to serve the Llama 3.2 Vision models while also supporting non-vision requests that use tools. The current recommended/example chat template assumes tool use. It injects a tool-use system prompt even when tools are not requested and it does not support image inputs. This PR

vllm.title: [Core] Fix broken log configuration
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
logging_configuration.md provides some sample logger configuration
that is no logner valid after #10134. This PR fixes the sample config,
as well as provides backwards compatibility so that existing
configuration files won't break.
Closes #10457
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Misc] Add pynccl wrappers for all_gather and reduce_scatter
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add pynccl wrappers for all_gather and reduce_scatter so we can use them in CUDA graphs.
In particular, Molmo and the new version of OLMo currently use all_gather, so these could be beneficial there.

vllm.title: [core] gemma2 full context length support
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
the scheduler treats it as a model without sliding window, and sliding window is only used for computation.
FIX #6220
FIX #8580

vllm.title: [Bugfix] 500 Internal Server Error when tool_choice is incorrect.
vllm.author: shenoyvvarun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR fixes the KeyError when tool_choice is incorrectly provided.

Request:
		{
	    "model": "vllm-model",
	    "messages": [ {"role": "user", "content": "what is 5+3"}],
	    "tool_choice": {},
	    "tools": [
	        {
	                "type": "function",
	                "name": "my_

vllm.title: [Model] Fix Baichuan BNB online quantization
vllm.author: wcwuwc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: fix baichuan bnb quantization on the fly

vllm.title: Update default max_num_batch_tokens for chunked prefill to 2048
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have seen that 512 is a very conservative value, especially once on H100. Increasing this is 2048 is still a bit conservative but a definite improvement in processing large prefills or throughput.

vllm.title: [Kernel][Hardware][AMD] Add support for GGUF quantization on ROCm
vllm.author: kliuae
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support for running GGUF models on ROCm with vLLM.

vllm.title: Prefix Cache Aware Scheduling [1/n]
vllm.author: rickyyx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
TL;DR

prototype in #9862
addresses #7883
This PR makes scheduling prefix aware in V0. KV Cache utilization will remain high with high prefix cache hit.
Yielding up to 50% throughput improvement on high prefix cache hit for batch inferencing, and 25% request throughput when online serving.
It doesn'

vllm.title: [2/N] Proper handling of placeholders in merged multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #10114
This PR updates #10044 to handle transformers v4.47 processors (huggingface/transformers#30962), which directly contain placeholder tokens in the processed input_ids.
I have also updated our code to properly replace targets with placeholders inside the processed prompt, and added unit

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Hardware][CPU] Fix `multi_modal_kwargs` broadcast for CPU tensor parallel
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix CPU tensor parallel inference on LMMs
multi_modal_kwargs should be broadcast to CPU worker
